reviews.comment:
Antigua estación que merece una remodelacion urgente, quienes están a cargo del lugar muy predispuestos pero la infraestructura debe ser renovada ya que esta en un lugar clave para los que vamos desde el amba y viajamos con animales o para fumar un pucho y usarlo de parada.

(Translated by Google)
An old station that urgently needs renovation. Those in charge are very willing, but the infrastructure must be renewed since it's in a key location for those of us traveling from the AMBA (Greater Buenos Aires) with animals, or just to have a smoke and use it as a rest stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5aE12QlJREAE

reviews.comment:
Es en la única estación q me hicieron descuento x ser socia del ACA, o en las demás se hacen los tarados o esta es especial!!! Gracias x la atención!!

(Translated by Google)
This is the only station where I got a discount for being an ACA member. Either the others are idiots or this one is special! Thanks for your help!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5MkxtZm5RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Nos salvó que estuviera cerca. Cuando fuimos a Gándara se me encendió la luz de la reserva de combustible. Googleando me Informé que era la mas cercana. Llegué comodamente, posee un cruce de boulevard. Está mano al sudeste.
No recuerdo otra particularidad, excepto que el playero fué amable.

(Translated by Google)
It was a lifesaver that it was nearby. When we went to Gándara, my low fuel light came on. A quick Google search revealed it was the closest gas station. I arrived easily; it's right on the boulevard. It's on the southeast side of town.
I don't remember anything else special about it, except that the attendant was friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5cU8zcFdREAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, nothing too relevant to highlight, since I went for fuel and the fill-up was fine, nothing too much to expect.
